title: Jade Liang
text:
I am a recent graduate from the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA), where I double majoried in Mathematics and Statistics & Data Science, with a Specialization in Computing. My fascination lies in the transformative power of data. I am particularly passionate about applying statistical methods and data-driven insights to solve real-world problems.
With a strong foundation in mathematics, programming, and data analysis, I am actively seeking opportunities where I can contribute my skills and continue to grow professionally.

title: Projects
text: Below is a collection of both academic and personal projects I’ve completed using Python, R, and SQL.

title: Projects

title: Work Experience
text:
Financial Analyst, Marcus & Millichap
Dec 2025 - Present

Automate and optimize financial data analysis workflows, reducing processing time by over 65%.
Build and maintain Excel-based Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) models to underwrite multifamily and retail investment opportunities, forecast cash flows, and guide pricing and investment decisions.
Collect, clean, and standardize financial data from rent rolls, P&Ls, and market comparables to support underwriting and valuation of commercial real estate assets.
Prepare professional-grade offering memorandums (OMs) by synthesizing underwriting, financial data, and market research on sales and rent comparables into investor-ready materials.



Math Tutor, LA Math Tutoring
Jan 2026 - Present

Translate complex mathematical concepts into structured, step-by-step frameworks to enhance student comprehension and retention.
Identify knowledge gaps and customize lesson strategies, improving students’ problem-solving accuracy and efficiency.



Data Analyst Intern, Kurma AI
Feb 2025 - May 2025

Build automated pipelines to extract raw text data and embedded images (e.g. tables, plots, figures) from research paper PDFs to train RAG and LLM models.
Clean extract text by removing special characters, citation patterns, and formatting inconsistencies, and implement code to exclude irrelevant images (e.g., logos, blank images).
Research and evaluate data extraction and cleaning methods to identify the most effective techniques for producing model-ready data.



Cashier, Wing Cheung Co.
Jun 2015 - Aug 2018

Provided friendly, accurate service to hundreds of customers during daily transactions.
Maintained organized, customer-friendly produce displays throughout each shift.
Memorized and recalled prices for 35+ items to ensure fast, accurate checkout.
